docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2022 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO NOV-17-2022 AT 3:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITAS TOWING & QA. DEFENDANT EDWARD DAVID BIVENS IS PRESENT. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED JUL-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BIVENS, EDWARD DAVID
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT BIVENS, EDWARD DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITAS TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT EDWARD DAVID BIVENS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS MARKED ABSENT WHEN ATTENDANCE WAS TAKEN AT 3:30 P.M., DEFENDANT APPEARED AT 3:39 P.M. DURING THE PROCEEDING, OATH ADMINISTERED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIVENS, EDWARD DAVID $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,695.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JAN-19-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
